caseStudies.headline: End-to-End Billing Automation
caseStudies.tagline: From 14 days to 2 days — automated billing across the full project lifecycle
caseStudies.challenge: Invoice creation was entirely manual, taking up to 14 days after service delivery. Proposals were assembled by copying data between disconnected tools, and there was no systematic way to track the handover from project completion to invoice dispatch. The team spent significant time on administrative tasks instead of client work.

solution.summary: Full migration to Zoho One with a connected process chain from lead capture to invoice dispatch — no manual steps required.
solution.description: New leads are captured and qualified in Zoho CRM. Accepted leads trigger automatic proposal generation directly in CRM. Upon client sign-off, a linked project is created in Zoho Projects. When the project is marked complete, Zoho Flow automatically generates and dispatches the invoice via Zoho Books — with all line items pulled from the project data.

artifacts: Automatic PDF invoices on project completion

caseStudies.headline: Lead Enrichment & Sales Acceleration
caseStudies.tagline: 70% more lead data, 60% faster first contact through automated enrichment
caseStudies.challenge: The sales team spent 30–40% of their working time manually researching incoming leads before making first contact. Data quality was inconsistent across the CRM, and high-value leads were routinely contacted too late — often after a competitor had already reached out.

solution.summary: AI-powered lead enrichment integrated directly into Zoho CRM, triggering automatically on every new lead creation.
solution.description: When a new lead enters Zoho CRM, an automated flow triggers an AI agent that enriches the lead record with company size, industry, revenue range, LinkedIn context, and an AI-generated qualification score. The sales team receives a prioritised, context-rich lead queue — ready to act on immediately without any manual research.

artifacts: Enriched lead profiles with company data

products.name: Lead Enrichment Agent
products.tagline: Automatic enrichment of incoming CRM leads with company data and AI qualification
products.problem: Sales teams spend 30–40% of their time on manual lead research before making first contact — time that should be spent selling. Most CRMs are filled with incomplete records that require hours of research per week.
products.description: A ready-to-deploy AI agent that integrates directly into your Zoho CRM. Every new lead is automatically enriched with firmographic data, LinkedIn context, and an AI-generated qualification score. Your team sees a prioritised, context-rich queue — not a list of empty names.

showcase.alt: Lead Enrichment Agent showing enriched lead profiles with qualification scores in Zoho CRM

products.name: Document Automation Suite
products.tagline: Generate proposals, contracts, and invoices automatically from your Zoho data
products.problem: Creating business documents manually is repetitive, error-prone, and slow. The data already exists in your CRM and ERP — but still gets copy-pasted into Word templates by hand, every single time.
products.description: A Zoho-native document automation suite that generates professional PDFs — proposals, contracts, invoices, and project reports — directly from your Zoho CRM and Books data. Triggered manually by a single click, by a workflow event, or on a schedule. Documents are delivered to clients automatically.

showcase.alt: Document Automation Suite showing a generated proposal PDF with live Zoho CRM data
